Class JDBCReportManager

java.lang.Object
jdbc.JDBCReportManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
ReportManager
public class JDBCReportManager extends Object implements ReportManager
JDBC implementation of the ReportManager interface. Handles database queries to generate analytical reports regarding sales, revenues, costs, and profits of the pharmacy's inventory.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Constructs a new JDBCReportManager with the given database connection.

    • JDBCReportManager

      public JDBCReportManager(Connection connection)
      Constructs a new JDBCReportManager with the given database connection.
      Parameters:
      connection - The active database connection.

  • Method Details

    • getMonthlyMedicationSales

      public List<MedicationStats> getMonthlyMedicationSales(String month, String year)
      Calculates the monthly sales, revenue, and profit of each medication.
      Specified by:
      getMonthlyMedicationSales in interface ReportManager
      Parameters:
      month - The month as a two-digit string (e.g. "05")
      year - The year as a four-digit string (e.g. "2026")
      Returns:
      List of medication statistics.

    • getTotalRevenueAndProfitPerMedication

      public List<MedicationStats> getTotalRevenueAndProfitPerMedication()
      Calculates total revenue and profit per medication across all time.
      Specified by:
      getTotalRevenueAndProfitPerMedication in interface ReportManager
      Returns:
      List of medication statistics.

    • getGlobalMonthlyRevenueAndProfit

      public GlobalStats getGlobalMonthlyRevenueAndProfit(String month, String year)
      Calculates the global monthly revenue and profit.
      Specified by:
      getGlobalMonthlyRevenueAndProfit in interface ReportManager
      Parameters:
      month - The month as a two-digit string (e.g. "05")
      year - The year as a four-digit string (e.g. "2026")
      Returns:
      The global stats.

    • getTopSellingMedications

      public List<MedicationStats> getTopSellingMedications(String month, String year, int limit)
      Retrieves the top-selling medications per month.
      Specified by:
      getTopSellingMedications in interface ReportManager
      Parameters:
      month - The month as a two-digit string (e.g. "05")
      year - The year as a four-digit string (e.g. "2026")
      limit - The maximum number of records to return.
      Returns:
      List of medication statistics.

    • getLowSellingMedications

      public List<MedicationStats> getLowSellingMedications(int limit)
      Retrieves low-selling medications.
      Specified by:
      getLowSellingMedications in interface ReportManager
      Parameters:
      limit - The maximum number of records to return.
      Returns:
      List of medication statistics.
